narrative_text: The shopkeeper gives the boy a bag of pastries from her shop. The boy and the dog pull the dented wagon back up the hill. The grandmother smiles when they arrive with the new treats.
scene_description: At the edge of the clearing, the boy cautiously approaches an ancient stone wall where a mysterious silver box rests on a pedestal. He holds the golden key forward as his dog watches intently, both sensing the magic in the air. The scene is filled with dappled sunlight and the quiet hum of the shimmering box.

properties.distinctive_features: thick brown curly hair and wide eyes

entities.pose: standing with his right hand reached forward toward the pedestal

properties.distinctive_features: long floppy ears and a wagging tail

entities.pose: sitting back on haunches with head tilted and ears perked

properties.distinctive_features: tiny heart-shaped keyhole on the front

entities.pose: resting centered on the flat surface
hovering slightly as if held in the boy's hand

properties.distinctive_features: long black handle and four sturdy wheels

entities.pose: parked at an angle toward the left side of the frame

properties.distinctive_features: dark chocolate chips and a white cloth cover

title: The Fix
